pr.title: [track_10min_16mb] LoRA TTT + SOTA Int5/Int6 (10L, BigramHash, SWA) — Atharva Date (ADIITJ)

output.summary: Document-isolated LoRA test-time training atop the SOTA Int5/Int6 10-layer model, scoring each chunk before adapter updates to keep artifacts untouched.
techniques: LoRA adapters reset between documents for zero artifact cost
Chunk-first scoring before Adam updates during eval
SWA start-fraction and warmdown tweaks on thwu1 base
